jurisdiction: EU (extraterritorial for UK suppliers serving EU customers)
status: Enforcement phase — Article 6/9 obligations live since Feb 2026
centrica_impact: Must obtain conformity-assessment attestations from any GenAI vendor whose tooling touches EU customer data. Affects M365 Copilot, Agentforce, Now Assist.

status: Second reading complete (March 2026); enactment expected H2 2026
centrica_impact: Pre-deployment risk assessments for any high-risk AI use-case. Recordkeeping and explainability obligations for customer-facing GenAI.

regulation: UK GDPR + Data Use & Access Bill
status: In force; DUA Bill royal assent expected June 2026
centrica_impact: Data residency clauses must be reviewed annually. Subject-access response SLAs tightening from 1 month to 21 days.

status: In force; revised 14-principle set issued April 2026
centrica_impact: All cloud-hosted OT-adjacent workloads must demonstrate principle compliance evidence by Sep 2026.
Critical IT vendors will need to demonstrate operational resilience, exit-readiness and tested DR — annual attestation to Ofgem.

status: In force; expanded supply-chain disclosure from 2026
centrica_impact: Annual modern slavery statement required from every Tier-1 supplier; Atlassian and Pega currently flagged for review.
